PalWorldSettings.ini.info: Generated from the beginner-friendly parameter boxes below. The container updates this file at every start. Use Extra Launch Arguments only for settings that are not represented by a box.

server_description.name: Server Description
server_description.info: Description shown for the Palworld server.

server_password.name: Server Password
server_password.info: Password required to join. Leave blank for public access.

public_ip.name: Public IP
public_ip.info: Optional public IPv4 address. Leave blank to let Palworld detect it.

public_lobby.name: Community/Public Lobby
public_lobby.info: Adds -publiclobby so the server can appear in the community server list.

use_backup_save_data.name: Palworld Save Backups
use_backup_save_data.info: Enables Palworld's built-in rotating save backups. This increases disk activity.

crossplay_platforms.name: Allowed Platforms
crossplay_platforms.info: Controls which clients may join. All Platforms allows Steam, Xbox, PlayStation 5, and Mac. Steam Only is useful for initial troubleshooting.

allow_client_mod.name: Allow Modded Clients
allow_client_mod.info: On permits players running client-side mods to connect. Off is the safer vanilla default and does not disable this server's PalBridge integration.

chat_post_limit.name: Chat Messages Per Minute
chat_post_limit.info: Maximum chat messages one player may send per minute. The default 10 helps limit spam while allowing normal chat and !getconnectcode.

pvp_enabled.name: Enable PvP
pvp_enabled.info: On enables all three Pocketpair-required PvP flags together: PvP mode, player damage, and defense against other guild players. PvP remains an experimental Palworld feature.

hardcore_enabled.name: Hardcore Mode
hardcore_enabled.info: On prevents normal respawning after death. Leave off for a standard community server.

death_penalty.name: Death Penalty
death_penalty.info: None drops nothing. Items drops carried items except equipment. Items + Equipment drops both. All also drops the active Pal team.
death_penalty.dropdown: {"All Items + Equipment + Team Pals":"All","Items + Equipment":"ItemAndEquipment","Items Only":"Item","None":"None"}

invader_enabled.name: Enable Base Raids
invader_enabled.info: On allows NPC invasion events against player bases. Off disables these raid events.

fast_travel_enabled.name: Enable Fast Travel
fast_travel_enabled.info: On allows normal fast travel. Off disables it globally.

start_location_select.name: Choose Starting Location
start_location_select.info: On lets new characters choose a starting location from the map. Off uses the game's automatic starting behavior.

exp_rate.name: Experience Rate
exp_rate.info: Multiplier for experience gained. 1.0 is vanilla, 2.0 doubles experience, and 0.5 halves it.

capture_rate.name: Pal Capture Rate
capture_rate.info: Multiplier for Pal capture chance. 1.0 is vanilla; larger values make captures easier.

spawn_rate.name: Pal Spawn Rate
spawn_rate.info: Multiplier for the number of wild Pals. Values above 1.0 increase server CPU and memory load.

enemy_drop_rate.name: Enemy Drop Quantity
enemy_drop_rate.info: Multiplier for items dropped by defeated enemies. 1.0 is vanilla.

collection_drop_rate.name: Gathering Drop Quantity
collection_drop_rate.info: Multiplier for resources obtained from gatherable objects. 1.0 is vanilla.

day_time_speed_rate.name: Daytime Speed
day_time_speed_rate.info: How quickly daytime passes. 1.0 is vanilla; 0.5 makes daytime last roughly twice as long.

night_time_speed_rate.name: Nighttime Speed
night_time_speed_rate.info: How quickly nighttime passes. 1.0 is vanilla; 2.0 makes nights pass about twice as quickly.

egg_hatching_time.name: Huge Egg Incubation Hours
egg_hatching_time.info: Base hours required to hatch a Huge Egg. Smaller eggs scale from this value. 72.0 is the traditional vanilla value; 0 makes incubation immediate.

player_damage_attack.name: Player Damage Dealt
player_damage_attack.info: Multiplier for damage dealt by players. 1.0 is vanilla.

player_damage_defense.name: Player Damage Taken
player_damage_defense.info: Multiplier for damage received by players. Values below 1.0 make players tougher.

pal_damage_attack.name: Pal Damage Dealt
pal_damage_attack.info: Multiplier for damage dealt by Pals. 1.0 is vanilla.

pal_damage_defense.name: Pal Damage Taken
pal_damage_defense.info: Multiplier for damage received by Pals. Values below 1.0 make Pals tougher.

player_hunger_rate.name: Player Hunger Drain
player_hunger_rate.info: Multiplier for player hunger depletion. Values below 1.0 make hunger drain more slowly.

player_stamina_rate.name: Player Stamina Drain
player_stamina_rate.info: Multiplier for player stamina consumption. Values below 1.0 make stamina last longer.

pal_hunger_rate.name: Pal Hunger Drain
pal_hunger_rate.info: Multiplier for Pal hunger depletion. Values below 1.0 reduce food consumption.

pal_stamina_rate.name: Pal Stamina Drain
pal_stamina_rate.info: Multiplier for Pal stamina consumption. Values below 1.0 make Pal stamina last longer.

guild_player_max.name: Players Per Guild
guild_player_max.info: Maximum members in one guild. The populated default is 20.

base_camp_max_in_guild.name: Bases Per Guild
base_camp_max_in_guild.info: Maximum bases one guild may own. Pocketpair lists 4 as the default and 10 as the maximum. More bases increase server load.

base_camp_worker_max.name: Pals Per Base
base_camp_worker_max.info: Maximum working Pals at each base. The populated default is 15; Pocketpair allows up to 50, with increased processing load.

max_building_limit.name: Buildings Per Player
max_building_limit.info: Per-player structure limit. 0 means unlimited. Set a limit on large public servers to control save size and processing load.

update_on_start.name: Update Server On Start
update_on_start.info: Runs SteamCMD app_update 2394010 before launching. Disable after testing if GSA handles updates separately.

validate_on_update.name: Validate During Update
validate_on_update.info: Adds SteamCMD validate. Useful for repair, but substantially increases startup time.

ue4ss_release.name: UE4SS Release
ue4ss_release.info: Official UE4SS GitHub release tag used for the packaged PalBridge mod loader.

ue4ss_url.name: UE4SS Download URL Override
ue4ss_url.info: Pinned official UE4SS zip URL tested by this blueprint. Clear it only if you intend to resolve a different release through GitHub.

ue4ss_sha256.name: UE4SS SHA-256
ue4ss_sha256.info: Checksum for the pinned UE4SS zip. Update this together with the URL.
